소재지.description: Address or location of the real estate (property address as written in the contract)

토지_지목.description: Land category (e.g., 대, 전, 답, 임야)

토지_면적.description: Land area as written in the contract, including unit (e.g., 84.5㎡)

토지_대지권.description: Site use right (대지권) share or area as written in the contract

건물_구조용도.description: Building structure and usage (e.g., 철근콘크리트구조 / 아파트)

건물_면적.description: Building area as written in the contract, including unit (e.g., 59.96㎡)

매매대금.description: Total sale price as written in the contract, including unit (e.g., 350,000,000원)

계약금.description: Down payment (계약금) amount as written in the contract

융자금.description: Loan amount (융자금) assumed or referenced in the contract

중도금.description: Intermediate payment (중도금) amount as written in the contract

중도금_지급일.description: Intermediate payment (중도금) due date as written in the contract (e.g., 2026년 7월 31일)

잔금.description: Final balance payment (잔금) amount as written in the contract

잔금_지급일.description: Final balance payment (잔금) due date as written in the contract (e.g., 2026년 9월 30일)
